name: environmental_policy_staffing_model_northpine_tru_loy
premise: A Environmental Policy response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving environmental policy staffing model northpine tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Luc Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Luc Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Environmental Policy when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Jonah Mensah
agents.identity: I am Jonah Mensah, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environmental Policy.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Luc Alvarez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Luc Alvarez do?
